YUWANCARD-PIG.title: Pig
YUWANCARD-PIG.cardsModifierDescription: Pig can use all cards. All cards will appear in rewards and shops.
YUWANCARD-PIG.eventDeathPrevention: Oink! Pig doesn't want to die yet...
YUWANCARD-PIG.description:
A [gold]mysterious pig[/gold].
It can use all cards and has infinite possibilities.
[i]Oink oink oink...[/i]
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: So many gems... but can I eat them?
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: These gems aren't for eating, but they can make you stronger! Choose one, little pig!
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancient: Oink! Still hesitating? Take your time, the gems aren't going anywhere!
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: I have many good things here, but I don't seem to have the carrot you want...
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Carrot! Do you know carrot? That's pig's favorite thing!
[i][font_size=22]Pig's eyes light up.[/font_size][/i]
DARV.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: Well, no carrots, but these gems might help you find more delicious things!
NEOW.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: Who are you? Are you here to bring pig food?
NEOW.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char: Pig wants... delicious food! And... to become stronger! So pig can protect the delicious food!
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: Wow! You're so pretty! Shiny like gold!
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: Oh my, cute little pig! Let me make you even prettier!
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancien: Come come! Let me give you some shiny good things!
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: You're so cute, you deserve the best decorations!
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Thank you! Pig will treasure it!
[i][font_size=22]Pig happily spins around.[/font_size][/i]
NONUPEIPE.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: Good piggy! Go now, adventure with my blessings!
OROBAS.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: You're interesting too!! Little pig!! Want to play together!!
OROBAS.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancient: Oink oink!! You can oink too!! We're friends!!
OROBAS.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: Giving you things!! Delicious things!! Or shiny things!!
OROBAS.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Pig wants both! Is that okay?
[i][font_size=22]Pig looks at OROBAS with expectant eyes.[/font_size][/i]
OROBAS.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: Okay!! All for you!! You're the best pig friend!!
PAEL.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: You look sleepy... pig is sleepy too...
PAEL.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: [thinky_dots]Then let's sleep together for a while... find delicious things in dreams...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]Giving you a sweet dream... with endless carrots...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Really?! Pig loves dreaming!
[i][font_size=22]Pig happily wags its tail.[/font_size][/i]
PAEL.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: [thinky_dots]Go... eat your fill in dreams before waking...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: You're fierce! But pig isn't afraid! Pig is strong!
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: [b]Good!! Brave!! Take this weapon!! Go fight!![/b]
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancient: [b]Little pig must fight too!! Get stronger!! Protect yourself!![/b]
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: [b]What weapon do you want?! Great sword?! Or shield?![/b]
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Pig wants... a weapon that can protect friends!
[i][font_size=22]Pig puffs out its chest.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: [b]Good!! That's a true warrior!! Take it!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: Come in little pig! Let me warm you! It's very comfortable here!
TEZCATARA.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancien: You look like you need rest! Come, lie by the fire for a while!
TEZCATARA.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: Giving you some [jitter][b]warm power[/b][/jitter]! So you can stay warm in the cold tower!
TEZCATARA.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Thank you! Pig feels so warm!
[i][font_size=22]Pig comfortably squints its eyes.[/font_size][/i]
TEZCATARA.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: Go! Continue forward with this warmth!
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: You look mysterious... are you good or bad?
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: Me? I'm just... a trader. What do you want?
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancient: Little pig, what do you have to trade?
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: I can give you power... but you need to pay a price.
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Pig... can give you oinks! That's pig's most precious thing!
[i][font_size=22]Pig thinks seriously.[/font_size][/i]
VAKUU.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: ...Interesting. Fine, take this power. Your innocence impresses me.
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-0.char: You're... a pig?! I'm a pig too!
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.0-1.ancient: Oink! Welcome, fellow pig! I've been waiting for so long!
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.1-0r.ancient: You're finally here! I've prepared many good things for you!
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-0.ancient: Choose one! All pig-exclusive good things!
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-1.char:
Wow! All things pig likes! Thank you piggy senior!
[i][font_size=22]Pig happily wags its tail.[/font_size][/i]
PIG_PIG.talk.YUWANCARD-PIG.2-2.ancient: Go! Let everyone know the power of pigs! Oink!
